title: EKAM Personalised Christmas Letter Coffee Mug with Custom Name, Santa Claus and Snowman Design Cup, Personalised Christmas Mug 11oz, Customised Initial Letter Cup
features: Customise Christmas Letter Mug - Personalise with name for a unique festive gift that everyone will love.
Click Customize Now" to add a Initial and name and make this charming mug a thoughtful gift for friends or family.
DISHWASHER AND MICROWAVE SAFE - Our mugs are up for a good scrub in the dishwasher. We only source the best quality cups for our customers.
This is a Perfect Gift For Friends, Family member Gift, Christmas Gift, Christmas, Movie, Xmas Gift, Holiday Gift, Secret Santa Gift, Stocking Filler, Christmas Tree Mug Gift.
HIGH QUALITY CERAMIC : Our mugs are made of high quality ceramic with a high gloss finish.
